name: WhoisXML API MCP Server
description: The official WhoisXML API MCP server: 32 first-party tools for WHOIS, DNS, IP geolocation, threat intel, typosquatting, email verification, and native bulk lookups.
author: Whois API, Inc.

tools.name: brand_alert
tools.description: Find newly added, dropped, or updated domains whose names contain specified brand terms.

tools.name: bulk_dns_lookup
tools.description: Run DNS lookups for up to 200 domains in a single call.

tools.name: bulk_email_verification
tools.description: Run email verification for up to 10,000 addresses in a single call.

tools.name: bulk_ip_geolocation
tools.description: Run IP geolocation for up to 200 IP addresses in a single call.

tools.name: bulk_job_results
tools.description: Fetch full per-input results for a completed native bulk job (created by `bulk_whois` or `bulk_email_verification`).

tools.name: bulk_job_status
tools.description: Check progress of an in-flight bulk job created by `bulk_whois` or `bulk_email_verification`.

tools.name: bulk_subdomain_lookup
tools.description: Discover subdomains for up to 200 apex domains in a single call.

tools.name: bulk_whois
tools.description: Run WHOIS lookups for up to 10,000 domains in a single call.

tools.name: categorization
tools.description: Classify a domain into IAB Content Taxonomy v3.1 content categories (Website Categorization v4).

tools.name: disposable_email_check
tools.description: Check whether an email address belongs to a disposable or temporary provider (e.g., mailinator, 10minutemail, guerrillamail).

tools.name: dns_history
tools.description: Look up historical DNS records for a domain (forward) or domains historically associated with an IP (reverse).

tools.name: dns_lookup
tools.description: Resolve current DNS records for a domain — A, AAAA, MX, NS, SOA, TXT, CNAME, PTR, SRV, CAA, DS, DNSKEY, or `all`.

tools.name: domain_and_subdomain_discovery
tools.description: Find newly-registered domains and subdomains containing one or more search terms, with registration dates.

tools.name: domain_info
tools.description: Get an enriched WHOIS profile for a domain by combining the current record with historical records to fill redacted or missing fields.

tools.name: domain_reputation
tools.description: Score a single domain's trustworthiness on a 0–100 scale by running live infrastructure and configuration checks (certificate validity, mail and name-server setup, malware-database and blackhole looku…

tools.name: email_verification
tools.description: Verify an email address via syntax check, MX lookup, and SMTP deliverability probe.

tools.name: ip_netblocks
tools.description: Look up CIDR ranges, ASN number/name, organisation, and registration dates for an IP address, ASN, or organisation name.

tools.name: ipgeolocation
tools.description: Get geolocation data (country, region, city, ISP, ASN) for an IP address, domain, or email.

tools.name: registrant_alert
tools.description: Find newly added, dropped, or updated domains whose WHOIS records match search terms in registrant contact fields (email, name, organisation, etc.).

tools.name: reverse_dns
tools.description: Search across DNS records by pattern and return matching domains plus the record values.

tools.name: reverse_ip
tools.description: Find every domain currently pointing at a given IP address, with first-/last-seen dates per domain.

tools.name: reverse_mx
tools.description: Find every domain that uses a specific MX server, with first-/last-seen dates.

tools.name: reverse_ns
tools.description: Find every domain delegated to a specific authoritative nameserver, with first-/last-seen dates.

tools.name: reverse_whois
tools.description: Find every domain whose WHOIS record contains a given free-text search term (registrant name, email, organisation, address, etc.).

tools.name: reverse_whois_advanced
tools.description: Find domains using field-specific WHOIS searches — e.g.

tools.name: ssl_certificates
tools.description: Retrieve TLS certificate details for a domain — issuer, validity period, subject alternative names (SANs), chain trust status.

tools.name: subdomain_lookup
tools.description: Enumerate up to 10000 known subdomains of a single domain (the upstream API's hard cap; check the "truncated_at_upstream_cap" response field for whether more may exist), with first-/last-seen timestam…

tools.name: threat_intelligence
tools.description: Check whether an indicator (domain, URL, IP, CIDR, or file hash) appears in known malware, phishing, spam, or botnet feeds.

tools.name: typosquatting
tools.description: Check whether a domain belongs to a typosquatting group, or expand every domain across all groups containing it.

tools.name: website_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a web page for a URL and return it as a native image content block plus a base64-encoded JSON payload (JSON's base64 field is deprecated as of 2026-10-04; prefer the native ima…

tools.name: whois
tools.description: Look up current WHOIS / RDAP registration data for a single domain — registrar, creation/expiry/updated dates, nameservers, status codes, and contact info when not redacted.

tools.name: whois_history
tools.description: Retrieve the full timeline of WHOIS changes for a domain — ownership transfers, registrar moves, nameserver swaps, and contact edits over time.
